goal: 给 E:/Work/Cooki/ClaudeCode/knowledge-base 做一个 Web 知识管理系统，仅本地运行，不考虑认证。要求：浏览所有 markdown 文档，支持目录和标签导航，类似维基百科的双向链接跳转，全文搜索，以及简单的文档编辑能力。代码输出到 E:/Work/Cooki/ClaudeCode/knowledge-base/web/ 目录

tree.description: Build Python Flask backend with markdown indexing, frontmatter parsing, directory tree API, and document serving (HTML render + raw markdown + backlinks)
Add full-text search API and tag aggregation/filtering API to the Flask backend
Add document editing API: read raw markdown for editing and save updated content back to disk, then re-index the changed file
Build the main HTML/CSS/JS frontend shell: sidebar with directory tree and tag cloud, main content area, search bar, and responsive layout
Implement search results display and tag filtering in the frontend, with clickable tags that filter the document list
Implement bidirectional wiki-link navigation: render [[wikilinks]] in document content as clickable links, show backlinks panel at bottom of each document
Add inline markdown editor with live preview: edit button toggles between view and edit mode, save button posts changes to backend
End-to-end smoke test: verify the full system works together — startup, tree navigation, document viewing with backlinks, search, tag filtering, and editing
